_note: Revisions are sequenced in two regimes: P (Preliminary, work-in-progress) and C (Contract, published). Combined with the status code (S0-S7) to fully identify a document version.
rules: Increment P-revisions until status reaches S4 (suitable for stage approval) or S7 (suitable for use)
Transition from P-regime to C-regime when the document is published for construction
Revision letters (A-Z) are NOT recommended in BS 1192:2007+A2:2016 (legacy from older BS 8888)

engine_lookup._purpose: Flat key/value form for runtime engine consumption
